ham.subject: Weekly Marketing Update – New Deals & Features Inside!
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you are doing well! Here’s what’s new in this week’s update:

1. New product launch – XYZ widget is now available.
2. Discount offer – 20% off on all accessories until Friday.
3. Upcoming webinar – Join us on Thursday at 3 PM for a live demo.

Thank you for your continued support.

Best regards,
Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Verification Required – <URL>
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected a discrepancy with your QuickBooks account. To protect your financial data, we need you to verify your invoice details immediately. Please click on the secure link below to confirm your invoice and avoid any potential service interruption:

<URL>

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your account will be suspended. For any questions, contact our support at <URL>.

Regards,
QuickBooks Security Team
